nodes.text: Date of birth. March twenty-second, seventy-two. Nineteen seventy-two. I share it with a colleague of mine — we always joke about that. Two Pisces in the same practice.

responses.text: Can you confirm the full year?

nodes.text: Nineteen seventy-two. I'm fifty-one. Old enough to know better, young enough to still have a back that gives out on me. *small laugh* Sorry. Long day.
Good. And everything else is documented, as I mentioned. I just want to be sure you understand I'm not trying to do anything outside the normal bounds here.
